request: You are Reviewer R6: source/chunk/claim provenance reviewer for DinoBrain. Work read-only. Inspect <machine-local-path> docs\OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md, docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\OS_V2_CONTRACT.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, src\index.ts, src\hybrid-retrieval.ts, source/chunk-related code found by rg 'create_source_chunk|claim_paths|anchor_only_unverified|provenance|source_chunk', and data project docs. Judge whether the plan has concrete completion conditions separating internal memory from verified durable source support. Return reviewer_id=R6, verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections[], required_doc_changes[], evidence_files[].
